name: Unusual AI activity outside working hours or error spike
related_rules: AI activity outside normal working hours
Sudden spike in AI API errors

query_model.where: activity outside local policy hours or API error rate spikes above baseline

response: Review source adapter, confirm business approval, and tune allowlists or policy thresholds.

elastic_example.query: event.dataset: agentguard.ai_activity and (agentguard.policy.outside_working_hours: true or agentguard.api.error_rate_spike: true)
